summary: Verified EU currency format implementation across the admin dashboard. All currency values now display in correct EU format: dot (.) for thousands separator, comma (,) for decimals. Example: €4.712,00 for tax amount, €112.352,00 for account balance.
passed_tests: ✅ Users tab pagination: 'Showing 50 of 110 users', 'Page 1 of 3'
✅ Pagination controls: First, Next buttons work correctly
✅ Search functionality: 'guido' finds 2 users, 'vittorio' finds results
✅ Tax Amount Due displays in EU format: €4.712,00 (verified)
✅ Account Balance displays in EU format: €112.352,00 (verified)
✅ Accounts tab: Balance visibility toggle works (masked: '€ •••••', revealed: '€0,00')
✅ User details panel shows correctly when clicking on a user
✅ No US format (€X,XXX.XX) detected - all values in correct EU format
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested with existing user Guido Dalla Nora who has tax hold of €4.712,00 and account balance of €112.352,00
context_for_next_testing_agent: EU currency formatting has been verified working correctly. The currency.js utility uses de-DE locale for formatting (toLocaleString('de-DE')). Key test user: Guido Dalla Nora (dallanoraguido477@gmail.com) has tax hold of €4.712,00 and account balance of €112.352,00, both displaying in correct EU format.
